HELLKITE-BURNING_AURA_POWER.description:
At the start of your turn, 
apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies.

HELLKITE-BURNING_REPRISAL_POWER.descript: This turn, whenever you take damage, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Scorch[/gold] to the attacker.
